capabilities.title: Project memory tri-command integration
capabilities.summary: Implemented project_memory data layer and wired /prog sync, /prog done, and /prog next integration paths with tests and docs.

capabilities.title: UI Launcher: Fix SERVER_SCRIPT relative path issue
capabilities.summary: Fixed ui-launcher skill to find progress_ui_server.py in plugin cache (~/.claude/plugins/cache) with fallback to relative path, enabling UI launch from any project directory.

capabilities.title: Prog-sync: Project memory sync workflow from git history
capabilities.summary: Implemented project_memory.py data layer (584 lines) and /prog sync command/skill for incremental capability synchronization from git history with batch confirmation.

capabilities.title: Git-auto v1.2.0: Add worktree decision gate
capabilities.summary: Upgraded git-auto skill to v1.2.0 with worktree isolation decision logic, enforcement modes, and escalation reasoning for safer git operations.

capabilities.title: Git-auto: Add executable escalation thresholds + guardrails
capabilities.summary: Added scripts/guardrails/ directory with apply_guardrails.py, protection_payload.json, and required-check.yml.tpl for configurable escalation thresholds.

capabilities.title: Progress workflow alignment with superpowers
capabilities.summary: Aligned progress-tracker skills (feature-complete, feature-implement-*, testing-standards) with superpowers integration gates and workflow patterns.

capabilities.title: Note Organizer Plugin 基础架构
capabilities.summary: 创建了 note-organizer 插件的基础结构，包括插件清单(plugin.json)、运行时架构文档(ARCHITECTURE.md)、README 和脚本模块。采用混合架构模式，将使用 Python 处理确定性任务，AI 处理创造性任务。

capabilities.title: Batch Scanner Module with CLI
capabilities.summary: Implemented a Python module for scanning files matching glob patterns with JSON output. Features include recursive pattern support (using **), multiple pattern arguments, duplicate detection, and sorted output. The module follows Unix tool philosophy with simple, predictable behavior. Includes comprehensive test suite with 11 tests covering basic matching, recursion, multiple patterns, edge cases, duplicates, and sorting.
